description_long: This is an elegant vanity nightstand featuring a large oval mirror mounted on a gently curved frame. The tabletop is wide and smoothly contoured, with three visible drawers—one central and two side drawers—each adorned with small, round knobs. The legs are slender, gracefully curved, and connected by a decorative stretcher with a circular accent at the center, providing both stability and visual interest. The finish is a light, off-white or cream color with subtle gold or beige trim, giving it a refined and classic appearance. The mirror is framed with matching trim, and the overall design suggests a blend of vintage and contemporary styles. This piece would typically be found in upscale urban interiors, such as bedrooms or dressing areas.
description: A refined vanity nightstand with a large oval mirror, three drawers, and elegantly curved legs in a light, classic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oval mirror, three drawers with knobs, and the full curved leg structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, depth of the tabletop, and the mirror's vertical orientation.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the mirror and the connecting stretcher between the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same slim profile and leg curvature as view 1.
attribute_leg_design: curved slender legs with a central stretcher
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall, in a bedroom or dressing area
